subcodes.first_line: This servant dispatched the handwriting of His Holiness unto the Most Holy Court, and it was illumined and blessed by the lights of the Most Great Countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این عبد دستخط آنحضرت را بساحت اقدس ارسال داشت و بانوار منظر اکبر منور و فائز
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @predictions and prophecies, @rejection, opposition and persecution
